title: vallesia glabra
intro: Vallesia glabra, also known as the 'Angel's Trumpet', is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Vallesia glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and useful plant in traditional medicine.
